data.name: Hentai World Tour
data.detailed_description:
Think you can stay focused under pressure?

Your task is straightforward: find two identical images and match them. But don’t be fooled—each stage demands sharp eyesight, steady concentration, and the patience to push through increasingly tricky layouts.

The game feels calm and casual at first, but quickly becomes a compelling mental workout. Easy to begin, hard to walk away from. And with a fixed time limit on every level, you’ll need to stay composed if you want to make it to the end.

Features:

Classic arcade-style matching gameplay

A fixed countdown timer for each stage — no speed adjustments, no shortcuts

Relaxing background music to keep you steady

Unlock full-screen mode once you finish the game

data.short_description: A simple but addictive matching game where you pair identical images under a fixed time limit. Stay focused, beat each stage before the clock runs out, and enjoy a calm yet challenging gameplay experience
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
